column1: # TSIS-1 Hybrid Solar Reference Spectrum (HSRS) v1 — B11 + B12 wavelength ranges.
#   Downloaded from LASP LISIRD (lasp.colorado.edu/lisird/data/tsis1_hsrs) via the LaTiS CSV API
#   on 2026-07-07. Ranges: 1530-1690 nm (B11) and 2070-2330 nm (B12); native 0.001 nm resolution
#   decimated to ~0.02 nm here (the CH4 fine structure comes from HITRAN
# irradiance is solar spectral irradiance E_lambda in W/m^2/nm at 1 AU. The LUT generator converts
#   the SHAPE to per-wavenumber E_nu via the lambda^2 Jacobian (E_nu ∝ E_lambda·lambda^2) before use.
# wavelength in nm; irradiance in W m^-2 nm^-1.
